items.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
items.summary: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.
items.titleZh: Netris从a16z筹集了1500万美元的A轮融资，以帮助AI新云更快上线
items.summaryZh: Netris提供在网络交换机上运行的软件，并提供一个平台，帮助新云运营商缩短上线时间。

items.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
items.summary: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro
items.titleZh: 苹果提高了Mac和iPad的价格，暂时放弃了iPhone
items.summaryZh: 苹果公司提高了MacBook Air和Pro以及iPad Air和Pro的价格

items.title: Stock market spoiler: Apple's price hikes erase Micron's post-earnings tech rally
items.summary: Stocks kicked off Thursday's trading session with a tech rally that quickly fizzled as investors weighed Micron earnings and Apple price hikes.
items.titleZh: 股市破坏者：苹果的价格上涨抹去了美光公司盈利后的科技反弹
items.summaryZh: 周四交易时段，股市以科技股反弹拉开序幕，但由于投资者权衡美光的收益和苹果的价格上涨，科技股反弹迅速失败。

items.title: Alan raises €480M led by Prosus at a €5.5bn valuation
items.summary: French insurtech Alan has raised €480M led by Prosus at a €5.5bn valuation, just months after its last round. The Paris company is betting that AI-driven prevention can reshape health insurance. Alan, the French health insurance company, has raised €480m ($55…
items.titleZh: Alan以55亿欧元的估值筹得4.8亿欧元，由Prosus领投
items.summaryZh: 法国保险科技公司Alan在上一轮融资仅几个月后，以55亿欧元的估值筹集了4.8亿欧元，由Prosus领投。这家巴黎公司押注人工智能驱动的预防可以重塑医疗保险。法国健康保险公司Alan已筹集4.8亿欧元（约合5500万美元）…

items.title: Apple jacks up prices on its MacBooks and iPads
items.summary: Yes, you can blame AI. The price increases result from surging memory chip costs and short supply.
items.titleZh: 苹果公司提高了MacBook和iPad的价格
items.summaryZh: 是的，你可以责怪人工智能。价格上涨是由于存储芯片成本飙升和供应短缺造成的。

items.title: Softbank CEO dismisses Elon Musk’s extraterrestrial data center idea in favor of maximizing Earth-side construction now: ‘He who strikes first wins’
items.summary: Son’s Softbank committed $19 billion last year to the Stargate project that aims to build AI infrastructure in the U.S.
items.titleZh: 软银首席执行官驳回了埃隆·马斯克的外星数据中心想法，转而支持现在最大限度地扩大地球侧的建设：“谁先打谁赢”
items.summaryZh: 孙正义的软银去年向Stargate项目投入了190亿美元，该项目旨在美国建立人工智能基础设施。

items.title: Wendy's is the market's latest short squeeze. JPMorgan flags 3 other stocks that could be next.
items.summary: Wendy's stock surged this week as retail traders cheered on a short-squeeze. JPMorgan flags three more stocks with high short interest.
items.titleZh: 温迪是市场上最新的空头。摩根大通列出了其他3只可能成为下一个目标的股票。
items.summaryZh: 温迪的股价本周飙升，零售交易员对空头回补表示欢迎。摩根大通又标记了三只高空头股票。

items.title: Europe’s AI wake-up call: cybersecurity threats, sovereignty fears, and a growing demand for ROI dominated VivaTech
items.summary: As 180,000 attendees descended on Paris, the conversations revolved around cybersecurity risks, European dependence on U.S. AI, and whether the returns on AI investment are actually materializing.
items.titleZh: 欧洲的人工智能警钟：网络安全威胁、主权担忧和对投资回报率日益增长的需求主导了VivaTech
items.summaryZh: 当18万名与会者来到巴黎时，讨论围绕着网络安全风险、欧洲对美国人工智能的依赖以及人工智能投资的回报是否真正实现。

items.title: Tesla to hire 1,000 more Giga Berlin workers as Europe demand returns
items.summary:
Tesla plans to hire another 1,000 workers at its Gigafactory outside Berlin, the automaker confirmed Thursday, as it moves to ramp production at its only European plant.
The hiring push comes as Tesla targets 7,500 vehicles per week at the Grünheide factory s…
items.titleZh: 欧洲要求特斯拉重新雇佣1000名Giga Berlin员工
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉周四证实，该汽车制造商计划在柏林郊外的Gigafactory再雇佣1000名工人，以提高其唯一一家欧洲工厂的产量。

items.title: Trump admin proposes axing brake pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
items.summary: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."
items.titleZh: 特朗普政府提议取消自动驾驶汽车的制动踏板要求，以提振特斯拉
items.summaryZh: 交通部希望取消“专为自动驾驶系统设计的”车辆的制动踏板要求

items.title: Tesla to ramp up production in Germany by 20%
items.summary: Tesla said on Thursday that production at its Berlin plant will rise by 20% to 7,500 vehicles per week from October this year.
items.titleZh: 特斯拉将在德国的产量提高20%
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉周四表示，从今年10月开始，其柏林工厂的产量将增长20%，达到每周7500辆。

items.title: Anthropic hires Orange’s AI chief as its European build-out accelerates
items.summary: Steve Jarrett, Orange’s chief AI officer since 2019, will join the Claude maker in Paris in late August to adapt its products for European and African markets. The head of artificial intelligence at the French telecoms group Orange is leaving to join Anthropi…
items.titleZh: Anthropic聘请Orange的人工智能主管，因为其欧洲扩张加速
items.summaryZh: 自2019年以来一直担任Orange首席人工智能官的Steve Jarrett将于8月底加入巴黎的Claude制造商，使其产品适应欧洲和非洲市场。法国电信集团Orange的人工智能主管即将离职，加入Anthropi…
